title: VinylCraft
description:
🎵 Your music. Your world.
🎧 Play your own MP3, OGG & WAV files directly in Minecraft
📂 Create & manage playlists in-game
🔀 Shuffle & 🔁 Repeat modes
🔊 Smooth volume slider
🖼️ Album art display in HUD
body:
# 🎵 VinylCraft 1.0.0 — Initial Release

## ✨ Features
- 🎧 Play MP3, OGG and WAV files directly in Minecraft
- 📂 Create and manage playlists in-game
- 🔀 Shuffle and 🔁 Repeat modes
- 🔊 Smooth volume slider
- 🖼️ Album art display in HUD and GUI

## 📁 How to use
1. Place your music files in `.minecraft/music/`
2. Press **P** to open VinylCraft
3. Enjoy your music!
